name: Red Cooked Bean Curd.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the drained tofu.
2. Mix all the marinade ingredients (ginger to sesame oil) together.
3. Stir in the bean curds and let stand for several hours, or overnight.
4. Heat a wok and cook the bean curd gently until all the liquid has been evaporated or absorbed.
5. Arrange the cabbage on a dish and turn the bean curd onto it.
6. Garnish with green onion and serve with boiled rice.
